description_long: This coatrack features a tall, cylindrical central post made of dark wood, with a rounded top that serves as a decorative finial. Two horizontal arms extend symmetrically from the upper section, each supported by angled braces, providing ample space for hanging coats or hats. A shorter horizontal bar is positioned below the main arms, likely for additional hanging capacity or for smaller items. The base consists of three angled legs that splay outward, ensuring stability on flat surfaces. The overall design is minimalist and functional, with no visible decorative carvings or embellishments. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the coatrack a classic and sturdy appearance suitable for urban entryways or lobbies.
description: A tall, dark wooden coatrack with two main horizontal arms, a rounded top, and three angled legs for stability. Its minimalist design emphasizes function and durability.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the horizontal arms, the central post, and the three splayed legs.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the narrow profile, the thickness of the central post, and the depth of the arms and legs.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with clear visibility of the arm supports and the symmetrical leg arrangement.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the profile of the post and the angled legs.
